race.comment: STRETAN RULER (1) created a big impression at his first Sydney outing when sprinted quickly to score a decisive win against most of these over 1100m in the G2 Silver Slipper Stakes at Rosehill.  Will be even stronger over the 1200m and looks the one to beat. PARADOXIUM (4) talented Extreme Choice colt resuming. Gave them a galloping lesson with a 2.75 len win over 1100m in LR MM at Wyong last December. Had plenty up the sleeve with a soft 900m trial win at Rosehill. Maps well and gets every chance. INCOGNITO (3) snagged back to last and circled the field with a respectable fourth over 1100m in the G2 Silver Slipper. Gave away a big start last start and ready to lift with the blinkers going on. HIDRIX (2) covered ground in the run and took an eternity to wind up when third in the G2 Silver Slipper. Blinkers go on and will need plenty of favours from the draw. TORNADO VALLEY (11) returns from a let-up after finishing second in the Magic Millions. Brings the right profile to win. Respect.
